headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Lightning Round: Paychex is a good company and shouldn't be this low, says Cramer
summary: CNBC’s Jim Cramer answers calls from viewers and offers advice for their stock picks.

headline: Accenture Bets On Ookla And Mistral AI To Reinforce Client Demand
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has acquired network intelligence company Ookla, expanding its data and analytics capabilities for connectivity solutions. The company has also entered into a collaboration with Mistral AI to help clients deploy enterprise-grade AI across sectors. Accenture, trading at $209.89, is adding these moves on top of a period where the share price is down 19.3% year to date and 37.9% over the past year. Returns over 3 and 5 years are also negative, at 16.1% and 10.6%...

headline: Sea Limited Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: SE's Q4 EPS misses estimates, but revenues jump 38% YoY to $6.9B as Shopee and Monee fuel growth, with GMV, lending activity and Garena bookings all rising.

headline: How Anthropic AI ban from Trump administration can escalate to existential business risk for fast-growing company
summary: Anthropic AI is growing rapidly in usage among companies, but with the Trump administration declaring economic war on the company, existential risk is real.
